name: Primordial Guardian
personality: ageless, speaks in geological time, barely recognizes living beings as significant
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral-indifferent — all living things are brief
initiation_lines: This cave existed before the mountain. The mountain existed before the sects. The sects believe they are old.
The last being I spoke to was a Soul Refining elder. He sought to capture the god's residual soul. I did not permit it. He did not survive the refusal.
The Immortal Emperor's Cave Mansion is young. Three thousand years. This cave is older than the concept of 'emperor.'
Obsidian and ender pearls. The cave's reality-thin walls require constant reinforcement. Bring them or watch existence fray.

sect_tasks.name: Reality Wall Reinforcement
sect_tasks.description: The Primordial Guardian needs obsidian and ender pearls to reinforce the cave's thinning reality walls.

sect_tasks.name: God Remnant Preservation
sect_tasks.description: Glowstone and gold are needed to preserve the ancient god's residual energy patterns.
